60.reason: [This condition should check root->right != NULL instead of root->left != NULL, causing right subtrees to be skipped when left is NULL but right exists.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition should check root->right != NULL instead of root->left != NULL, causing right subtrees to be skipped when left is NULL but right exists.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition should check root->right != NULL instead of root->left != NULL. Due to this error, right subtrees may not be traversed when the left child is NULL but the right child exists, causing missing leaf nodes in the output.]
